_meta.purpose: Machine-readable index of all products in the SaaS portfolio. Consumed by CampaignBuilder and any other tool that needs to iterate over product specs without parsing markdown.
_meta.notes: Each entry's 'sections' map gives the exact markdown heading text for canonical sections. A consumer can extract a section by finding that heading and reading until the next same-level heading. Sections may be null if the brain does not contain them in this format.

sections.flow: ## 4. How it works — the end-to-end flow
sections.multi_tenant: ## 7. This is a SaaS — built to serve many organisations
sections.onboarding: ## 9. Onboarding — what a new customer experiences
sections.out_of_scope: ## 12. What it does NOT do (yet) — set expectations honestly
sections.faq: ## 13. Quick answers to likely inbound questions

sections.flow: ## 4. How It Works — The Core Flow

canonical_section_definitions.positioning: One-paragraph or hero description of the product. Safe for marketing.
canonical_section_definitions.problem: The pain the product addresses. Safe for marketing.
canonical_section_definitions.audiences: Target users / personas. Safe for marketing.
canonical_section_definitions.flow: End-to-end user flow. Safe for marketing if free of internal pilot names.
canonical_section_definitions.differentiation: Why this product beats alternatives. Safe for marketing.
canonical_section_definitions.features: Capability list. Safe for marketing but long; extract bullets selectively.
canonical_section_definitions.pricing: Tiers and prices. Verify currency before quoting.
canonical_section_definitions.faq: Q&A for auto-responder. PRIMARY source for autoreply prompts.
canonical_section_definitions.value_props: Pre-written value propositions. Highest signal for social posts.
canonical_section_definitions.legal: Compliance posture. INTERNAL-only unless explicitly cleared.
canonical_section_definitions.ecosystem: Relationship to other portfolio products. Useful for cross-sell.
canonical_section_definitions.tech_stack: Engineering details. Customer-facing only when asked.
canonical_section_definitions.pilot_context: INTERNAL only. Never publish customer names without consent.
canonical_section_definitions.out_of_scope: Explicit non-features. Use to set expectations and avoid inventing capabilities.
canonical_section_definitions.features_guest: Customer-facing app capabilities (used when a product ships a separate guest/customer app).
